title: Principal Investment Banker at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
